content: مَصر مَعروفَة بِريحَة وَطَعم اِلسَمنَة اِلبَلَدي
translations: eng:Egypt is well know for the smell and taste of its margerine

transcriptions.arabizi: masramaAroofa bi|reeha wa taAm ilsamna ilbaladi
